text:
I issued STOP given the critical budget constraints. 

**Final summary:** The environment turned out to be a complex open-plan house with many interconnecting rooms (kitchen, media room, formal fireplace living room, dining area, foyer) and several decorative mirrors that caused me to misidentify reflected rooms as new spaces during exploration, burning a significant amount of the step/tool budget in backtracking loops. I was unable to definitively locate a distinct bedroom matching "bedroom to your left" before the tool-call budget became critical, so per the budget-law protocol I committed to stopping in the living/dining area complex — the most instruction-consistent location I could reach — rather than risk ending the episode without ever calling STOP.
